sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Topics 45:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Topics 45:1
items.html: In ZON of Bina of AB, the male is the phase of VAK of GAR, meaning VAK of Hochma, and the female is the phase of record of the first expansion. In ZON of Bina of SAG, they are phases if records that remained from the second expansion, from the lights of ZON of Bina of AB after their departure. (Inner Light, Item‎ 47)
